title: Start live broadcast after selecting source and target languages
description: Verifies a host can configure languages and start a broadcast, resulting in a shareable listener link being shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /broadcast
Select a source language
Select one target language
Allow microphone access when prompted
Start broadcasting
Verify a listener link is displayed for sharing

title: Create a new room and reach the in-room conversation view
description: Verifies a user can create a room from the lobby after configuring languages/voice and reach the in-room UI where conversation controls are available.

steps.description: Navigate to /rooms
Start creating a new room
Select a valid source language
Select at least one valid target language
Select a valid voice option
Confirm creation to enter the room
Verify the user lands in a room session view with participant conversation controls visible

title: Join an existing room by ID and reach the in-room conversation view
description: Verifies a user can enter a room ID from the lobby, join the room, and reach the in-room UI where they can configure language/voice.

steps.description: Navigate to /rooms
Start creating a new room
Select a valid source language
Select at least one valid target language
Confirm creation to enter the room
Copy the room ID shown in the room UI
Navigate to /rooms
Fill the room ID field with the copied room ID
Submit the join room form
Verify the user lands in the corresponding room session view

title: Leave a room and rejoin using the same room ID
description: Verifies a participant can leave an active room and then rejoin it from the lobby using the room ID, returning to an active room view.

steps.description: Navigate to /rooms
Start creating a new room
Select a valid source language
Select at least one valid target language
Confirm creation to enter the room
Copy the room ID shown in the room UI
Leave the room to return to the lobby
Fill the room ID field with the copied room ID
Submit the join room form
Verify the user returns to the room session view after rejoining

title: Prevent starting broadcast with no target languages selected
description: Verifies the host cannot start a broadcast without selecting any target language and sees a validation error prompting for at least one target language.

steps.description: Navigate to /broadcast
Select a source language
Start broadcasting
Verify a target language selection validation error is visible

title: Change language and voice selection in an active room
description: Verifies a participant can change their target language and voice settings within a room and the selection remains applied in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /rooms
Start creating a new room
Select a valid source language
Select at least one valid target language
Confirm creation to enter the room
Change the participant target language to a different valid option
Change the participant voice to a different valid option
Verify the updated language and voice selections are reflected in the participant controls

title: Open VOD studio and verify upload-ready configuration
description: Verifies a user can access the VOD studio, see an upload control that accepts video input, and view project configuration controls.

steps.description: Navigate to /vod
Verify the upload control is visible and ready to accept a video file
Verify the VOD project configuration UI is displayed

title: Navigate from landing page to broadcast setup
description: Verifies a user can switch the interface locale on the landing page and navigate into the broadcast setup where configuration options are available.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select a different interface language in the language selector
Click the navigation link to the broadcast experience
Verify the broadcast setup options are displayed

title: Show validation when joining with a malformed room ID
description: Verifies the app prevents joining when the user enters a malformed room ID and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /rooms
Fill the room ID field with an invalid malformed value
Submit the join room form
Verify a room ID validation error is visible

title: Navigate from landing page to rooms lobby
description: Verifies a user can switch the interface locale on the landing page and navigate into the rooms lobby where create/join options are available.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select a different interface language in the language selector
Click the navigation link to the rooms experience
Verify the room lobby and its create or join options are displayed

title: Reject an unsupported VOD file type on upload
description: Verifies the VOD studio blocks unsupported file types and shows a validation error without starting a project.

steps.description: Navigate to /vod
Select an unsupported file type using the upload control
Verify a file type validation error is visible

title: Navigate from landing page to VOD studio
description: Verifies a user can switch the interface locale on the landing page and navigate into the VOD studio where upload and dubbing options are available.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select a different interface language in the language selector
Click the navigation link to the VOD experience
Verify the video dubbing studio is displayed
